title: pinus montana subsp. uncinata
intro: Pinus montana subsp. uncinata, also known as Stone Pine or Table Mountain Pine, is a subspecies of evergreen tree native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for centuries, with its resin and needles possessing medicinal properties that include antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pinus montana subsp. uncinata include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy for colds and flu. Herbal preparations of the plant include essential oils, tinctures, and teas, which can be used to promote relaxation, alleviate coughs, and soothe skin irritations.
